svg.text: Prefab Group
I. Functions of Prefab Groups
Prefab Groups can reference multiple Prefabs, including each Prefab's Location and Rotation (relative to group center).
Can be created directly in the editor, or via Node Graph during Stage runtime.
Creating via Node Graph is equivalent to creating multiple Prefabs simultaneously.
Prefab Groups make Entity placement more convenient; editing the group's location moves all Prefabs inside accordingly.
Batch Placement
II. Prefab Group Editing
Prefab Library Editing
Select multiple Prefabs in the Prefab Library.
Right-click to create a Prefab Group
(or merge existing Prefab Groups).
Group center Location calculated automatically.
Entity Placement Scene Editing
Select multiple placed Entities in the scene.
Right-click to create a Prefab Group
(or merge existing Prefab Groups).
Group center Location calculated automatically.
III. Edit Prefab Group Information
After selecting a Prefab Group, adjust each Prefab's Location and Rotation relative to the group's center.
Example: A Prefab Group containing two Prefabs shows individual offset parameters for each member.
Moving the group moves all contained prefabs together while preserving relative positions.
IV. Creating Prefab Groups with Node Graph
Creating a Prefab Group directly via nodes is equivalent to creating each Prefab separately.
Use the "Create Prefab Group" node in entity node graphs to spawn grouped entities during runtime.
All prefabs in the group are instantiated simultaneously with their relative positions preserved.
V. Creating Prefabs (Related Tutorial)
The "Creating Prefabs" tutorial covers video-based instruction on prefab creation workflows.
Covers: creating prefabs from basic modules, editing attributes/components/node graphs, and saving.
Prerequisite for: Defining and Updating Custom Variables, Embarking On Your Creative Journey.
Prefab Groups are especially useful for repeatedly placing the same arrangement of objects (e.g., furniture sets, enemy formations).
Related Documentation:
AI Generated, based on Craftspeople Academy. Version: Luna 7
